name: FORGE INNOVATION DEVELOPMENT CORP.
business: The company's primary objective is commercial and residential land development, including the purchase and sale of real estate, targeting properties primarily in Southern California. It also intends to manage properties it owns and properties owned by unaffiliated third parties. The company's first property acquisition was 29 acres in Desert Hot Springs (sold), and in 2023 it acquired a 51% interest in Legend LP, which owns Mission Marketplace, a grocery anchored shopping center in Jurupa Valley, California.

exposures.sentence: The Company's primary objective is commercial and residential land development, including the purchase and sale of real estate, targeting properties primarily in Southern California.
